heading: Step 2: Retrieve the Service Attachment URIs from Confluent.
body:
- In your Confluent account, [provision a Google Cloud Private
  Service Connect network](https://docs.confluent.io/cloud/current/networking/private-links/gcp-private-service-connect.html).

- Navigate to the Ingress connections tab for your
  network.

- Note the value of DNS domain. You will need this
  value for a later step.

- Click the + Private Service Connect Access
  button.

- Provide a name for the connection.

- In the GCP Project ID field, provide the
  `gcpProjectId` which you noted in the `getAccountDetails`
  response.

- Under Step 2, Note the service attachment URIs
  for a later step.

  For multi-zone clusters, note all three URIs. For a
  single-zone cluster, navigate to the Cluster
  settings page for your cluster. Under Cloud
  details, note the value of Zones. Note the value
  of the service attachment URI belonging to that zone.
